name: Evening Primrose Oenothera biennis
summary: Evening Primrose (Oenothera biennis) is tracked for mechanism-informed herb research in the workbook. Human-outcome claims should remain gated until source and dosage review are complete.
description: Evening Primrose (Oenothera biennis) is tracked for mechanism-informed herb research in the workbook. Human-outcome claims should remain gated until source and dosage review are complete.
mechanisms: Systematic reviews show no consistent benefit for eczema
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Herbal Products Used in Menopause and for Gynecological Disorders
A review of effective herbal medicines in controlling menopausal symptoms

dosage: Oil providing gamma-linolenic acid (GLA): 240-540 mg GLA/day (~1-3 g oil); variability across formulations
typical_dosage: Oil providing gamma-linolenic acid (GLA): 240-540 mg GLA/day (~1-3 g oil); variability across formulations
